scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && mkdir -p dist/api && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp popup.html dist/popup.html && cp side-panel.css dist/side-panel.css && cp api/openapi.yaml dist/api/openapi.yaml && cp node_modules/axe-core/axe.min.js dist/axe.min.js && node scripts/prepare-dist-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=service-worker.js && esbuild src/content/content-script.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --global-name=StealthLightbeaconContentScript --outfile=content-script.js && esbuild src/popup/popup.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=side-panel.js && cp service-worker.js dist/service-worker.js && cp content-script.js dist/content-script.js && cp side-panel.js dist/side-panel.js
scripts.test:unit: vitest --run tests/shared/contracts.test.ts tests/shared/rule-engine.test.ts tests/shared/adversarial-validation.test.ts tests/shared/validation-codemap.test.ts tests/shared/anti-bot.test.ts tests/shared/backend-settings.test.ts tests/shared/panel-settings.test.ts tests/shared/performance-trace.test.ts tests/shared/rulesets-catalog.test.ts tests/shared/knowledge-base-catalog.test.ts tests/shared/rules-support.test.ts tests/shared/security-headers.test.ts tests/shared/wcag-structure.test.ts tests/background/orchestrator.test.ts tests/background/scan-history.test.ts tests/background/storage.test.ts tests/background/ruleset-catalog.test.ts tests/background/knowledge-base.test.ts tests/background/host-policy.test.ts tests/background/toolbar-state.test.ts tests/background/backend-bridge.test.ts tests/background/service-worker-context.test.ts tests/background/security-headers-runtime.test.ts tests/ui/grouping-and-export.test.ts tests/ui/export-branches.test.ts tests/ui/pdf.test.ts tests/popup/popup-state.test.ts tests/popup/popup-initialize.test.ts tests/popup/popup-interactions.test.ts tests/popup/popup-tabs.test.ts tests/content/content-script.test.ts tests/content/extractor.test.ts tests/phase4/icon-assets.test.ts tests/phase4/manifest.test.ts tests/phase4/openapi-contract.test.ts tests/phase4/bundle-cleanliness.test.ts tests/phase4/ci-release-readiness.test.ts tests/cli/audit-budget.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest --run tests/shared/contracts.test.ts tests/shared/rule-engine.test.ts tests/shared/adversarial-validation.test.ts tests/shared/validation-codemap.test.ts tests/shared/anti-bot.test.ts tests/shared/backend-settings.test.ts tests/shared/panel-settings.test.ts tests/shared/performance-trace.test.ts tests/shared/rulesets-catalog.test.ts tests/shared/knowledge-base-catalog.test.ts tests/shared/rules-support.test.ts tests/shared/security-headers.test.ts tests/shared/wcag-structure.test.ts tests/background/orchestrator.test.ts tests/background/scan-history.test.ts tests/background/storage.test.ts tests/background/ruleset-catalog.test.ts tests/background/knowledge-base.test.ts tests/background/host-policy.test.ts tests/background/toolbar-state.test.ts tests/background/backend-bridge.test.ts tests/background/service-worker-context.test.ts tests/background/security-headers-runtime.test.ts tests/ui/grouping-and-export.test.ts tests/ui/export-branches.test.ts tests/ui/pdf.test.ts tests/popup/popup-state.test.ts tests/popup/popup-initialize.test.ts tests/popup/popup-interactions.test.ts tests/popup/popup-tabs.test.ts tests/content/content-script.test.ts tests/content/extractor.test.ts tests/phase4/icon-assets.test.ts tests/phase4/manifest.test.ts tests/phase4/openapi-contract.test.ts tests/phase4/bundle-cleanliness.test.ts tests/phase4/ci-release-readiness.test.ts tests/cli/audit-budget.test.ts tests/phase4/smoke.test.ts tests/background/backend-failure-integration.test.ts tests/background/orchestrator-backend.test.ts
scripts.test:ui-load:strict: pnpm run build && SMOKE_REQUIRE_PLAYWRIGHT=1 node scripts/extension-load-smoke.mjs
